case_title: FERNANDA NAVARRO VS. RC MAINTENANCE, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAVARRO, FERNANDA AS TO DEFENDANT RC MAINTENANCE, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
